title: Section 50
content: Notwithstanding anything contained in 1[section 29 of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974), it shall be lawful for any court of a Metropolitan Magistrate] to pass any sentence authorised by this Act in excess of its powers under the said section.
footnote: 1.Subs. by Act 38 of 1984, s. 9, for certain words and figures (w.e.f. 12-3-1985).
